center.name: Bharatpur, Rajasthan
center.summary: Bharatpur, Rajasthan是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白腹隼雕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: On the other hand, they are absent in eastern India and only occur as a vagrant to Sri Lanka and Bangladesh. In India, they are most regularly found in areas such as the Chambal ravines, Ranthambore National Park, the Chir zone of the lower Kumaun Himalayas, and in winter in the Keoladeo National Park of Bharatpur, Rajasthan. From central Myanmar, they range across into northwestern Thailand and northern Laos (though possibly only as a visitor rather than breeding in the latter two)
